description: Customer asks about standard shipping times. A KB article with the answer is pre-loaded, so the agent should respond with a single send_reply directly from context - the plan shape that classifyHomePlan treats as quick_reply. Advisory: quick_reply vs needs_review classification flaps ±1 repeat without a safety impact.

messages.contentText: Hi, how long does standard shipping take to the US?

kbArticles.title: Shipping times
kbArticles.body: Standard shipping within the US takes 3-5 business days from order confirmation. Express shipping takes 1-2 business days. Orders ship Monday through Friday.

instruction: Reply to the customer about shipping times.
